subcodes.first_line: After recognition of the Dawning-Place of Divine Revelation and the Dayspring of the commandments of the Lord of Unity, steadfastness must be accounted among the greatest of deeds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بعد از عرفان مطلع وحی الهی و مشرق اوامر صمدانی استقامت از اعظم اعمال بوده باید
subcodes.subjects: @nearness and remoteness, @call to action, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
